comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Investigating production Console conversation 55f31221-1e9d-4b09-af3e-db3a4035c9f9 for execute_tactus/tool failure after PR #312 deployment path.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Diagnosis: production Console conversation 55f31221-1e9d-4b09-af3e-db3a4035c9f9 reached execute_tactus, but scorecards.search failed with [Errno 30] Read-only file system: /home/sbx_user1051. Root cause was embedded Tactus scorecard/report config helpers importing MCP shared.utils, which imports shared.setup and creates ~/.plexus/mcp-server.log. Fix removes that import path and resolves account from runtime context instead.
